rows.label: tev031201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fojimua about his work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Fojimua about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Fojimua about Candid & Credible's ground gear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Fojimua about recent developments.

rows.label: tev031201_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Fojimua about recent developments.

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0001
rows.name:
I volunteered as a BLADE mechanic
because I wanted to do anything I
could to aid you humans, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Every little bit helps, right? And in that spirit,
I've taken up Blue Blood maintenance in addition
to my my usual Doll repair duties. But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those Blue Bloods are... Well, the technology is
astonishing, isn't it? Even with my Ma-non training,
I struggle to to to wrap my head around parts of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, every day is a learning experience,
I suppose? But I think whoever invented
the Blue Blood is a certifiable genius![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0008
rows.name:
There's a Ma-non who hangs out on Union
Drive named Aqual. Have you met him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0009
rows.name:
He's super honest, don't you think? A
true believer in justice, that one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Apparently he applied to become
a Companion and got the job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I wish my little brother Sostenasa was more
like him. What is it you humans say? I would
have fewer gray hairs or...something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Did you know that every piece of Candid & Credible
protective wear is based on the actual Ma-non
space suits we use on our galactic travels?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0021
rows.name:
They are especially resilient against
electromagnetic rays—which I think you
generally refer to as electric attacks?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Well, if you ever need to to
dodge lightning bolts as some
kind of weird training method...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, I guess that's not very feasible, is it?
Still, our gear will certainly help prevent you
from getting burnt to to an electric crisp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Did you hear the dreadful
news about Aqual?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Some criminal scoundrel
murdered him, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's such a tragedy, isn't it? Aqual was the kind
of Ma-non we all looked up to, and I wanted
Sostenasa to follow in his footsteps. But now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, maybe this is the low point in troubles
between your people and mine? Because I very much
want to to to believe that we can move past this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Did you hear the wonderful news
about Aqual the Companion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Apparently he busted some kind of
violent criminal! It's a proud day
for the Ma-non, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Perhaps Aqual was born
to be a Companion...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I hope my little brother Sostenasa
learns to be half as honest and
diligent as he is, you know?[ST:wait ]
